title: Creamy Midnight Ethiopian Snapper Fish Stir-fry
description: A fresh and creamy dish featuring snapper fish, inspired by traditional Ethiopian cuisine with a touch of midnight craving for something special.
instructions: Season the fish with salt and pepper. Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add garlic cloves, diced green onions, and cayenne pepper. Sauté until fragrant and slightly golden.
Pour in almond milk and bring to a boil. Reduce heat to low, add cream cheese, and stir well until the mixture thickens.
Gently place fish fillets into the skillet, ensuring they are not overcrowded. Cover and cook for about 5-7 minutes on each side or until fully cooked.
Serve hot with additional garnishes of green onions if desired.
